boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure matches batch, assay, criterion, date.

final_answer: The clinical batch X-78 may be released. Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely matches the release requirements for batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and the release date of 2026-06-28, as confirmed by policy STD-XOR-078-P. The closure occurred before the shipment date, satisfying all conditions for release.
